name: I Just Want To See You
original_name: 君のことだけ見ていたい
overview: Nagase Yuma and Asakura Sakura, lifelong friends, navigate unspoken feelings until their final high school summer, when Sakura finally confesses with a kiss.

trailers.title: [ENG SUB] Upcoming BL Drama Trailer - "kimi no koto dake miteitai" (I Only Want to See You)
